---
pagetitle: "Resume — Simon Yan"
toc: false
page-layout: custom
---

::: {.section .bg-white style="padding-top: 8rem;"}
::: {.section-narrow}

::: {.text-center .reveal}
[Resume]{.section-label}

<h2 class="section-heading">Han (Simon) Yan</h2>

Data Scientist · Quantitative Analyst · AI/ML Engineer

<div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:1.4rem;flex-wrap:wrap;font-size:0.88rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin:1.4rem 0 2rem;">
<span><i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Ithaca, NY</span>
<span><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> hyan86652@gmail.com</span>
<span><i class="bi bi-phone"></i> (206) 519-9388</span>
<span><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> linkedin.com/in/sy31</span>
</div>

<a href="Simon_Yan_Resume.pdf" class="btn-primary-custom" style="margin-bottom:3rem;" download><i class="bi bi-download"></i> Download PDF</a>
:::

<!-- EDUCATION -->
::: {.reveal}
[Education]{.section-label}
:::

::: {.timeline}

::: {.timeline-item .reveal}
[Expected May 2026]{.period}

### M.P.S. in Information Science {.mb-0}
[Cornell University · Ithaca, NY · Concentration: Data Science]{.org}

::: {.desc}
Cumulative GPA: 3.45/4.0

Coursework: Applied Machine Learning · Simulation Modeling & Analysis · Data Communication · Info Computing
:::
:::

::: {.timeline-item .reveal}
[Graduated June 2025]{.period}

### B.A. in Geography: Data Science {.mb-0}
[University of Washington · Seattle, WA]{.org}

::: {.desc}
Cumulative GPA: 3.55/4.0 · Major GPA: **3.89/4.0** · Annual Dean's List (2023–2024, 2024–2025)

Coursework: Data Science · Machine Learning · GIS Database Programming · Elements of Statistical Methods
:::
:::

:::

<br>

<!-- EXPERIENCE -->
::: {.reveal}
[Work Experience]{.section-label}
:::

::: {.timeline}

::: {.timeline-item .reveal}
[June 2024 — Aug 2024]{.period}

### Quantitative Investment Researcher Intern {.mb-0}
[Central China Securities Co., Ltd. (HKEX: 1375) · Shanghai, China · Data Analytics & Reporting]{.org}

::: {.desc}
- Optimized 10+ multi-factor alpha signal strategies (e.g., Momentum, Volatility) by incorporating market-regime classification to enhance signal stability and reduce drawdown during volatile periods.
- Engineered a modular backtesting framework in Python, enabling the automated simulation of 20+ equity strategies to support the team's hypothesis validation and parameter tuning.
- Built an automated ETL pipeline (Python/Pandas) processing 100K+ daily records, implementing data validation and outlier-handling logic to ensure consistent, analysis-ready data for downstream reporting.
- Translated complex performance metrics into clear, actionable briefs for non-technical stakeholders, directly informing committee-level resource-allocation decisions.

:::
:::

::: {.timeline-item .reveal}
[June 2023 — Aug 2023]{.period}

### Financial Product Researcher Intern {.mb-0}
[Central China Securities Co., Ltd. (HKEX: 1375) · Market & Business Analysis]{.org}

::: {.desc}
- Spearheaded comprehensive sector research across the Semiconductor and Autonomous Driving industries, producing 3 deep-dive investment memos that directly informed the team's product-development roadmap.
- Assessed historical performance and risk-adjusted return profiles of 4 candidate funds against benchmark indices, informing selection of 2 funds for the firm's FOF allocation.

:::
:::

:::

<br>

<!-- PROJECTS -->
::: {.reveal}
[Projects]{.section-label}
:::

::: {.timeline}

::: {.timeline-item .reveal}
[Sept 2025 — Dec 2025]{.period}

### Private Equity Forecast Analysis — Quantitative Analyst Lead {.mb-0}
[The Riverside Company]{.org}

::: {.desc}
- Led a team on a four-part investment-performance study for a private-equity client, evaluating projection accuracy, holding-period dynamics, and early-warning signals across the firm's portfolio.
- Modeled investment outcomes via logistic regression, identifying a ~54% early-miss threshold beyond which negative-IRR probability surpasses 50%, and an optimal 2–4 year asset holding period.
- Realigned project strategy based on client feedback, translating complex statistical methodologies into outcome-first reporting to drive non-technical stakeholder decision-making.
- Delivered an MVP dashboard and technical documentation to ensure reproducible underwriting workflows.

:::
:::

::: {.timeline-item .reveal}
[Oct 2025 — Dec 2025]{.period}

### Wikipedia RAG — ChatBot {.mb-0}
[Cornell Course Project]{.org}

::: {.desc}
- Led a 3-member team to architect and deploy an interactive RAG web chatting application (R, Shiny), delivering an end-to-end verifiable knowledge-retrieval workflow to mitigate LLM hallucinations.
- Engineered an automated query pipeline integrating OpenAI and MediaWiki APIs, utilizing a source-grounded prompt design to systematically reduce LLM hallucinations.
- Developed a scalable, reactive UI featuring session history and exportable citations, prioritizing transparent source tracking and ease of use for non-technical users.

:::
:::

::: {.timeline-item .reveal}
[Aug 2025 — Oct 2025]{.period}

### Predicting National Flood Insurance Program Claims {.mb-0}
[Cornell Course Project]{.org}

::: {.desc}
- Built and benchmarked predictive regression models (XGBoost, Random Forest, Lasso) in R on a 500K+ FEMA claims dataset to forecast flood payouts, achieving an R² of 0.956 and reducing baseline RMSE by 80%.
- Used SHAP and Partial Dependence Plots to identify and communicate key risk drivers in plain-language terms, providing actionable insights for insurance pricing and underwriting decisions.

:::
:::

:::

<br>

<!-- ADDITIONAL INFORMATION -->
::: {.reveal}
[Additional Information]{.section-label}
:::

::: {.skills-grid}

::: {.skill-category .reveal}
<h4><i class="bi bi-code-slash"></i> Languages</h4>

::: {.skill-tags}
[Python]{.skill-tag} [R]{.skill-tag} [Java]{.skill-tag} [SQL]{.skill-tag} [JavaScript]{.skill-tag} [HTML/CSS]{.skill-tag} [Shell Script]{.skill-tag}
:::
:::

::: {.skill-category .reveal .d1}
<h4><i class="bi bi-boxes"></i> Libraries & Tools</h4>

::: {.skill-tags}
[Pandas]{.skill-tag} [NumPy]{.skill-tag} [Scikit-learn]{.skill-tag} [Shiny]{.skill-tag} [Matplotlib]{.skill-tag} [Seaborn]{.skill-tag} [Git]{.skill-tag} [Tableau]{.skill-tag} [Docker]{.skill-tag} [A/B Test]{.skill-tag}
:::
:::

::: {.skill-category .reveal .d2}
<h4><i class="bi bi-clipboard-data"></i> Methods & Tools</h4>

::: {.skill-tags}
[Excel (Pivot Tables, VLOOKUP)]{.skill-tag} [PowerPoint]{.skill-tag} [Regression Modeling]{.skill-tag} [Data Visualization]{.skill-tag}
:::
:::

:::

:::
:::
